title: Extract Names from List
scenario: Extract the names from the following list: ['John Doe', 'Jane Smith', 'Alice Brown', 'Bob White']. Each name should be on a new line. The names should be in title case.
constraints: Must be under 100 characters per name
Must use title case for each name

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output meets the constraints provided
Check if the output is readable and easy to understand
